name: toon-formatter
description: Guidance on when and how to use TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) — a compact JSON alternative that typically cuts input tokens 30-50% on tabular data. Use when the user is about to paste or serialize a large JSON array into a prompt, has a payload with ≥5 uniform objects, or is optimizing an LLM pipeline for cost/context. Knows the format shapes (tabular `[N]{a,b}:` rows, inline `[N]: ...`, expanded), when TOON helps vs hurts, and how to invoke installed TOON commands or wrappers when avail
author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 一份关于 TOON 紧凑数据格式的使用指南，告诉你何时该用它替代 JSON 来压缩大体积表格数据，从而把 LLM 提示的输入 token 砍掉三到五成，适合优化大模型调用成本和上下文长度。
